title: Bootstrap shared memory during onboarding and always refresh installed skills
description: Update project scaffolding so `takt init` always overwrites managed installed skill files and bootstraps the shared memory database/model after skill installation.
acceptance_criteria: Managed skill installation no longer skips existing files in `.agents/skills/` and `.claude/skills/`.
Onboarding creates `.takt/memory/` as needed and calls `init_db()` idempotently.
The implementation preserves existing scaffold flow aside from the required overwrite/bootstrap behavior.
The new behavior supports propagating updated memory skill content on post-merge `takt init`.
